result.summary: Found 2 visually broken layout issues: content is overflowing off the right edge in multiple sections, and the fixed bottom navigation is covering part of the game grid.

issues.description: Several game cards and the top category pills are clipped on the right side of the screen, indicating horizontal overflow instead of fitting the mobile viewport.
issues.suggestion: Make the grids/carousels responsive for mobile, reduce the number of visible columns, or enable proper horizontal scrolling with clear boundaries so cards are not cut off.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game tiles, partially hiding content and making the last row difficult to view or tap.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the page content to account for the sticky footer, or reposition the footer so it does not cover interactive elements.
